body.purpose: Feed text, descriptions, content. The default reading size at 16px.

title.purpose: Author names, section headings, card titles. Semibold at 16px.

label.purpose: Timestamps, source attribution, tab labels, navigation labels. 12px medium weight.

caption.purpose: Secondary metadata, region names, version numbers. 12px regular weight.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Barely-visible lift. Used only on floating overlays (rewrite paused card).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover transitions and state changes.

motion.name: scale-press
motion.purpose: Tactile press feedback on action buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Dark background, light text. Used for compose and primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.3 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions. Light surface background, dark text. Used for settings, theme toggle.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent action button. Used for navigation items and feed action bar. Full rounding on action buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; height: auto; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s; outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.637 0.151 230); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for feed items and sidebar widgets. Flat surface with subtle border.
components.html:
Author Name
2 hours ago
This is a sample feed post with enough text to demonstrate line height and spacing within the card component.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 6.25px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0 / 70%); padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-card-avatar { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.922 0 0); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-author { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.205 0 0); line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-time { font-size: 12px; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.205 0 0); white-space: pre-wrap; } .ds-card-actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; } .ds-action-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-action-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.637 0.151 230); } .ds-action-btn:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field. Stroke-based with subtle border. Used for search and compose.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 36px; width: 100%; border-radius: 5px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); background: transparent; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.205 0 0); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 20%); }

components.name: Navigation Button
components.description: Default navigation item. Transparent background, icon + optional label. Icon-only on smaller screens.
components.css: .ds-nav-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 8px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.205 0 0); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-nav-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Button Active
components.description: Active navigation item. Surface background indicates current page.
components.css: .ds-nav-btn-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 8px; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-nav-btn-active:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0 0); } .ds-nav-btn-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
xb is a reading surface that disappears. The interface holds space for content without competing with it — every pixel serves the feed, every color choice defers to the words and images authored by others. The system rejects the visual noise of Weibo's original interface: no ad slots, no animated banners, no decorative gradients, no competing navigation hierarchies.

The aesthetic philosophy is restrained neutrality. Backgrounds are tinted off-whites, not pure white. Text is near-black, not jet black. Borders whisper. Shadows barely exist. The only chromatic moments are functional: a sky-blue reply, an emerald repost, a rose like. These accents appear on interaction, not at rest — the canvas is silent until the reader acts.

This is not a SaaS dashboard. There are no hero metrics, no card grids, no gradient CTAs. It is not Weibo. There are no ad breaks, no trending popups, no cluttered sidebars. It is a reading surface with the discipline of a well-set book page.
keyCharacteristics: Content-first: the feed dominates; chrome is minimal
Achromatic at rest: all color is reserved for interactive feedback
Tonal layering: depth through background shade differences, not shadows
System typography: no custom fonts; the OS native stack provides clarity at all sizes
Responsive rail layout: navigation collapses from labeled sidebar to icon rail on smaller screens

rules.name: The No-Brand-Color Rule
rules.body: There is no primary accent color in the design system. The interface's identity is its absence. Do not introduce a brand hue to 'add personality' — personality comes from typography, spacing, and the restraint itself.

rules.name: The Interaction-Only Rule
rules.body: Chromatic colors (blue, green, rose) appear exclusively on interactive hover/active states. At rest, every surface is achromatic.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never use pure #000 or #fff. Use the OKLCH-defined neutrals which are perceptually calibrated.

rules.name: The System Font Rule
rules.body: Never load custom web fonts for the UI chrome. The system font stack renders instantly, handles CJK text natively, and respects the user's OS preferences.

rules.name: The Weight-Over-Size Rule
rules.body: Create hierarchy through font-weight contrast (400 → 600) before increasing font size. The title and body share the same 1rem size — weight alone distinguishes them.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No component carries a drop shadow in its default state.

rules.name: The Tonal-Layering Rule
rules.body: Use background shade to indicate elevation, not shadows. Canvas is the base layer. Surface is one step up.

dos: Use OKLCH for all color definitions. Perceptual uniformity depends on OKLCH's lightness channel.
Keep all surfaces achromatic at rest. Color is reserved for interactive feedback only.
Use system-ui font stack. Custom fonts are a performance and consistency liability for a browser extension.
Use tonal layering (background shade differences) to indicate elevation, not shadows.
Maintain the three-column responsive layout: navigation rail → main feed → right sidebar.
Use active:scale-[0.96] on action buttons for tactile press feedback.
Apply backdrop-blur to sticky header elements (tabs) so content scrolls cleanly beneath them.
Keep the action bar's chromatic hover colors consistent: sky-blue for reply, emerald for repost, rose for like.
donts: Introduce a brand accent color. The interface's identity is its restraint. '克制的个性' means personality comes from what's absent.
Use pure #000 or #fff in the UI. Use the OKLCH-defined neutrals.
Add drop shadows to cards or containers. The system is flat by default — rejects Weibo's shadow-heavy aesthetic.
Use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients). Single solid colors only.
Use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as colored accents).
Load custom web fonts for UI chrome. System fonts render instantly and handle CJK natively.
Use glassmorphism as a default treatment. backdrop-blur is reserved for sticky headers only.
Create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Rejects '传统 SaaS 仪表盘'.
Use modals as the first solution for user flows. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
Animate CSS layout properties. Use transform and opacity for motion only.
Use bounce or elastic easing curves. Use ease-out with exponential curves.
